title: Users who shouted 'One more two weeks' won: Tencent HuanYuan Hy3 is free for an extended period until August 5th, the 295B MoE model's free trial period is renewed
excerpt: A large model that was open-sourced less than two weeks ago has extended its free trial period from two weeks to nearly a month, all because of user feedback sa
content_html:
A large model that was open-sourced less than two weeks ago has extended its free trial period from two weeks to nearly a month, all because of user feedback saying "another two weeks." On July 20, Zhang Jun, the public relations director of Tencent, revealed on Weibo that when the two-week free trial of the HuanYuan large model Hy3 was about to end, the company received strong feedback from users requesting an extension. As a result, Tencent decided to extend the limited-time free offer for Hy3 to August 5th for WorkBuddy and CodeBuddy users.

The main focus of this free trial, Hy3, is the new generation model that Tencent officially open-sourced and released on July 6th. Its most distinctive feature is a model that combines fast and slow thinking - it can provide intuitive responses quickly and also take time to perform in-depth reasoning, with both rhythms integrated into the same architecture. In terms of technical foundation, Hy3 uses a MoE (Mixture of Experts) architecture, with a total parameter scale of 295B and activated parameters of 21B, which means that only a small part of the experts are activated during each inference, using relatively modest computing costs to leverage a vast knowledge capacity; it supports up to 256K context length, allowing it to absorb long documents or entire codebases without losing the previous context.

sentences.en: A large model that was open-sourced less than two weeks ago has extended its free trial period from two weeks to nearly a month, all because of user feedback saying "another two weeks."
sentences.zh: 一款开源不到两周的大型模型，将免费试用期从两周延长到了近一个月，这一切都是因为用户反馈称“又是两周”。

sentences.en: On July 20, Zhang Jun, the public relations director of Tencent, revealed on Weibo that when the two-week free trial of the HuanYuan large model Hy3 was about to end, the company received strong feedback from users requesting an extension.
sentences.zh: 7月20日，腾讯公关总监张军在微博透露，在欢远大车型Hy3为期两周的免费试用即将结束时，公司收到了要求延期的用户强烈反馈。

sentences.en: As a result, Tencent decided to extend the limited-time free offer for Hy3 to August 5th for WorkBuddy and CodeBuddy users.
sentences.zh: 因此，腾讯决定将Hy3对WorkBuddy和CodeBuddy用户的限时免费优惠延长至8月5日。

blocks.html_en: The main focus of this free trial, Hy3, is the new generation model that Tencent officially open-sourced and released on July 6th. Its most distinctive feature is a model that combines fast and slow thinking - it can provide intuitive responses quickly and also take time to perform in-depth reasoning, with both rhythms integrated into the same architecture. In terms of technical foundation, Hy3 uses a MoE (Mixture of Experts) architecture, with a total parameter scale of 295B and activated parameters of 21B, which means that only a small part of the experts are activated during each inference, using relatively modest computing costs to leverage a vast knowledge capacity; it supports up to 256K context length, allowing it to absorb long documents or entire codebases without losing the previous context.

sentences.zh: 本次免费试用的主打产品Hy3是腾讯于7月6日正式开源并发布的新一代机型。

sentences.en: Its most distinctive feature is a model that combines fast and slow thinking - it can provide intuitive responses quickly and also take time to perform in-depth reasoning, with both rhythms integrated into the same architecture.
sentences.zh: 其最显着的特点是结合了快思维和慢思维的模型——既可以快速提供直觉反应，又需要时间进行深入推理，两种节奏都集成到同一个架构中。

sentences.en: In terms of technical foundation, Hy3 uses a MoE (Mixture of Experts) architecture, with a total parameter scale of 295B and activated parameters of 21B, which means that only a small part of the experts are activated during each inference, using relatively modest computing costs to leverage a vast knowledge capacity; it supports up to 256K context length, allowing it to absorb long documents or entire codebases without losing the previous context.
sentences.zh: 在技​​术基础上，Hy3采用MoE（Mixture of Experts）架构，总参数规模为295B，激活参数为21B，这意味着每次推理时只激活一小部分专家，用相对适中的计算成本来撬动海量的知识容量；它支持高达 256K 的上下文长度，允许它吸收长文档或整个代码库，而不会丢失以前的上下文。

content_html_zh:
一款开源不到两周的大型模型，将免费试用期从两周延长到了近一个月，这一切都是因为用户反馈称“又是两周”。 7月20日，腾讯公关总监张军在微博透露，在欢远大车型Hy3为期两周的免费试用即将结束时，公司收到了要求延期的用户强烈反馈。 因此，腾讯决定将Hy3对WorkBuddy和CodeBuddy用户的限时免费优惠延长至8月5日。

本次免费试用的主打产品Hy3是腾讯于7月6日正式开源并发布的新一代机型。 其最显着的特点是结合了快思维和慢思维的模型——既可以快速提供直觉反应，又需要时间进行深入推理，两种节奏都集成到同一个架构中。 在技​​术基础上，Hy3采用MoE（Mixture of Experts）架构，总参数规模为295B，激活参数为21B，这意味着每次推理时只激活一小部分专家，用相对适中的计算成本来撬动海量的知识容量；它支持高达 256K 的上下文长度，允许它吸收长文档或整个代码库，而不会丢失以前的上下文。
